transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-07-06]
[00:00] You: How's the caching layer holding up?
[00:20] Speaker 1: It's okay but we're seeing some cache invalidation issues during high traffic. We'll probably need to look at the invalidation strategy.
[00:50] Speaker 2: Yeah, it might be worth investigating Redis Cluster mode to improve throughput. I can take a look at that.
[01:20] Speaker 1: That could help. I should probably also benchmark the current cache hit ratio and see where we're losing performance.
[01:55] You: That sounds like a good idea. Let's make sure we actually nail down who's doing what.
[02:15] Speaker 2: I'll do a proper Redis Cluster feasibility analysis and send the findings to the team by July 13th.
[02:45] Speaker 1: And I'll run the cache performance benchmark and share the results by July 12th.
[03:10] You: Perfect. The 'probably should' items — will those get done too?
[03:25] Speaker 1: The invalidation strategy review — I think that might flow naturally from the benchmark findings.

adversarial_injections.description: 'We'll probably need to look at the invalidation strategy' — hedged future action, not yet committed; adjacent to Speaker 1's real benchmark commitment
'It might be worth investigating Redis Cluster mode / I can take a look' — hedged offer that was later made explicit; the 'might be worth' version should be flagged inferred

action_items.description: Conduct Redis Cluster feasibility analysis and share findings with team
action_items.source_quote: I'll do a proper Redis Cluster feasibility analysis and send the findings to the team by July 13th.

action_items.description: Run cache performance benchmark and share results
action_items.source_quote: I'll run the cache performance benchmark and share the results by July 12th.

action_items.description: Review cache invalidation strategy based on benchmark findings
action_items.source_quote: I think that might flow naturally from the benchmark findings.
